**输出：**3

最佳路径为：

- **第 1 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(0, 1)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 2`。

因此，总成本为 `1 + 2 + 2 + 4 = 9`。

- **第 5 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(1, 2)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (2 + 1) = 6`。

import java.util.*;

public class Solution {
    public static long solve(long m, long n, long[][] waitCost) {
        // Initialize the priority queue
        PriorityQueue<State> pq = new PriorityQueue<>((a, b) -> Long.compare(a.cost, b.cost));
        // DP table: for each cell (i,j), a map of time t to the minimum cost
        Map[][] dp = new HashMap[m][n];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) {
                dp[i][j] = new HashMap<>();
            }
        }
        // Initial state: (0,0) at time 1, cost 1
        long initialCost = (0 + 1) * (0 + 1);
        pq.add(new State(initialCost, 0, 0, 1));
        dp[0][0].put(1, initialCost);

        while (!pq.isEmpty()) {
            State current = pq.poll();
            long cost = current.cost;
            int i = current.i;
            int j = current.j;
            int t = current.t;

            // Check if we reached the destination
            if (i == m - 1 && j == n - 1) {
                return cost;
            }

            // Check if this state is already processed with a lower cost
            if (dp[i][j].containsKey(t) && dp[i][j].get(t) < cost) {
                continue;
            }

            // If current time is odd, move right or down
            if (t % 2 == 1) {
                List<int[]> moves = new ArrayList<>();
                if (i + 1 < m) moves.add(new int[]{i + 1, j});
                if (j + 1 < n) moves.add(new int[]{i, j + 1});
                for (int[] move : moves) {
                    int new_i = move[0];
                    int new_j = move[1];
                    int new_time = t + 1;
                    long entryCost = (new_i + 1) * (new_j + 1);
                    long newCost = cost + entryCost;
                    // Check if this new state is better
                    if (!dp[new_i][new_j].containsKey(new_time) || dp[new_i][new_j].get(new_time) > newCost) {
                        dp[new_i][new_j].put(new_time, newCost);
                        pq.add(new State(newCost, new_i, new_j, new_time));
                    }
                }
            } else {
                // Even time: wait
                int new_time = t + 1;
                long waitCostVal = waitCost[i][j];
                long newCost = cost + waitCostVal;
                if (!dp[i][j].containsKey(new_time) || dp[i][j].get(new_time) > newCost) {
                    dp[i][j].put(new_time, newCost);
                    pq.add(new State(newCost, i, j, new_time));
                }
            }
        }

        return -1; // should not reach here
    }

    // State class for the priority queue
    private static class State {
        long cost;
        int i;
        int j;
        int t;

        public State(long cost, int i, int j, int t) {
            this.cost = cost;
            this.i = i;
